description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named AMR-Wind API docs that generates and deploys documentation on push to the development branch, specifically when files in amr-wind, docs/doxygen, or the workflow file itself change. Use an ubuntu-latest job that checks out the repository with submodules, installs doxygen and graphviz dependencies, builds the docs with doxygen, and deploys the resulting HTML to the gh-pages branch using JamesIves/github-pages-deploy-action.
